notes: Filter facing-page text by splitting blocks into left/right halves based on image center, keeping dominant side. CER 0.1836->0.1696.
Replace image-center split with gap-based spine detection for facing-page filtering. Finds largest horizontal gap between text blocks to identify spine. CER 0.1696->0.1315.
Add page number extraction from top/bottom margins. Page number accuracy 0% -> 35.3%, CER slightly improved.
Sort text at individual line level instead of block level for correct reading order. CER 0.131 -> 0.073.
Improved page number extraction to detect header-embedded page numbers (e.g. '110 ELENA FERRANTE'). Page accuracy 35.3% -> 44.1%.
Add line-level facing-page filtering using gap detection between line centers. CER 0.072 -> 0.068.
Rejoin hyphenated line breaks (e.g. 'won-\nder' -> 'wonder'). CER 0.068 -> 0.065.
Extract page numbers from ALL blocks before facing-page filter, and remove page number text from output. Page accuracy 44.1% -> 52.9%.
Line-level page number extraction with 20% margins. Scans individual lines for standalone numbers and header patterns. Page accuracy 52.9% -> 64.7%.
Join visual lines into paragraphs using Y-gap detection. CER 0.064 -> 0.055, WER 0.22 -> 0.13.
Detect paragraph breaks using short line width (lines ending before right margin). CER 0.055 -> 0.054.
Remove running header lines (short all-caps/title-case text with digits in margins) from output. CER 0.054 -> 0.053.
CLAHE contrast enhancement made OCR worse. CER regressed 0.053 -> 0.062. Reverting.
Don't break paragraphs after hyphenated lines. No score change - hyphen rejoin already handled it.
Fix OCR character substitutions: double hyphens to em dashes, angle brackets to guillemets. CER 0.0534 -> 0.0533.
Line-level facing-page filter now requires minor side to have >15% of total text before splitting. Prevents false splits on single-page images. CER 0.053 -> 0.048.
Adding text ratio threshold to block-level facing-page filter made things much worse. Facing page text leaked through. Reverted.
Indentation-based paragraph detection was too aggressive, creating false paragraph breaks. Reverted.
Filter out very short lines (<4 chars) that are OCR noise from bleed-through. CER 0.048 -> 0.047.
Widen page number margin to 25%. Page accuracy improved 64.7% -> 67.6% but CER slightly regressed. Net score slightly worse.
Regex to fix missing spaces between lowercase-uppercase was too aggressive, hurting German text with internal capitals. Reverted.
OpenCV deskew using Hough line detection. CER 0.047 -> 0.043, PageAcc 64.7% -> 67.6%. Latency 126ms -> 249ms (within budget).
Image sharpening (unsharp mask) didn't improve OCR quality. Slight regression. Reverted.
Remove all-caps running header lines in top margin (e.g. 'L'AMICA GENIALE'). CER 0.043 -> 0.043.
More conservative short-line paragraph detection (75th percentile reference, 0.82 threshold). No improvement. Reverted.
Also remove title-case header lines in top margin (e.g. 'Du côté de chez Swann'). CER 0.0426 -> 0.0424.
OCR-aware page number regex was too loose, matching normal text. CER regressed. Reverted to original regex patterns.
Lower paragraph gap threshold (0.5x line height). No improvement - dialogue paragraphs don't have extra spacing.
Indentation-based paragraph detection (refined with 1.5x height threshold). Still creates false positives. Reverted.
Lower deskew minimum angle (0.1 vs 0.3). No change - no images have skew in that range.
Conditional line-level filter (only when block filter didn't split). No change - block filter always applies.
Downscaling to 1600px max hurt OCR quality. Page accuracy dropped to 41.2%. Reverted.
Remove short header-like lines in top margin that are much shorter than body text. CER 0.042 -> 0.041.
Filter short noise lines in bottom margin (background text, game boards, etc). CER 0.041 -> 0.041.
Bilateral filter (d=9, sigma=75) for noise reduction before OCR. CER 0.041 -> 0.038. Page accuracy dropped 67.6% -> 58.8% but net score improved.
Lighter bilateral filter (d=7, sigma=50) was worse than d=9/sigma=75. Reverting to previous settings.
Background normalization (morphological closing) was worse than bilateral filter and added 350ms latency. Reverted to bilateral filter.
fastNlMeansDenoisingColored was way too slow (2976ms) and worse results. Reverted to bilateral filter.
Short-line paragraph break minimum length threshold didn't help. The change helped some samples but hurt others. Reverted.
Dual OCR: original image for page numbers, denoised image for text. Recovers page accuracy (58.8% -> 67.6%) while keeping denoised CER benefit. Score 0.04585 -> 0.04482.
OCR digit correction for page numbers was too aggressive, causing false matches. Reverted.
Stronger bilateral filter (d=11, sigma=100). CER 0.039 -> 0.038. Score 0.04482 -> 0.04404. Latency 462ms.
Even stronger bilateral filter (d=13, sigma=120) was worse - over-smoothing hurts OCR. Reverted to d=11/sigma=100.
Add unsharp mask after bilateral filter (1.5x sharp - 0.5x blur). CER 0.038 -> 0.035. Score 0.04404 -> 0.04121.
Tuning sharpening parameters (tried 2.0/-1.0 and 1.3/-0.3) didn't improve over 1.5/-0.5. Reverted.
Tried different Gaussian blur sigmas for sharpening (2.0 and 4.0). Sigma=3.0 is optimal. Reverted.
Vertical facing-page filter incorrectly splits single-page images on paragraph gaps. Massive regression. Reverted.
Only break paragraphs on short lines that end with sentence-ending punctuation. Prevents false paragraph breaks from truncated lines near book spine. Score 0.04121 -> 0.04056.
Search both original and denoised OCR results for page numbers (fallback). Page accuracy 67.6% -> 70.6%. Score 0.04056 -> 0.03997.
Add contrast stretching (normalize to full dynamic range) before bilateral filter. CER 0.03479 -> 0.03463. Score 0.03997 -> 0.03982.
Detect paragraph breaks when line starts with opening quotation marks and previous line ends with punctuation. CER 0.03463 -> 0.03460. Score 0.03982 -> 0.03979.
Perspective correction using page boundary contour detection. No score change - contours likely not matching. Reverted.
Convert space-hyphen-space between words to em dash. Fixes European em dash OCR pattern. CER 0.03460 -> 0.03457.
Indentation-based paragraph detection: if line starts indented (>1.5x line height right of base margin) and prev line ends with punctuation, break paragraph. CER 0.03457 -> 0.03456.
Converting denoised image to grayscale before OCR made things much worse. CER 0.035 -> 0.040. ML Kit works better with color. Reverted.
Extract page numbers from assembled text as final fallback (check first/last lines for standalone numbers). Page accuracy 70.6% -> 79.4%. Score 0.03975 -> 0.03799.
Extended text-based page number extraction to check more lines and patterns. No improvement - the remaining missing page numbers aren't in the assembled text. Reverted.
Removing period-space between lowercase letters was too aggressive - removed legitimate sentence-ending periods. CER regressed. Reverted.
Fix missing apostrophes in common English contractions (dont -> don't, etc.). CER 0.03456 -> 0.03453.
Gentle CLAHE on luminance channel (clip=1.5, tile=8x8) badly hurts ML Kit OCR. CER 0.035 -> 0.043. Even conservative CLAHE degrades text recognition. Reverted.
Split paragraphs at dialogue boundaries: after closing guillemets/quotes before uppercase, and before opening guillemets/quotes after colon. CER 0.03453 -> 0.03442.
Adaptive paragraph gap threshold (median gap + 0.5× height) instead of fixed 0.8× height. No improvement. Reverted.
Widen page number search margin from 20% to 25%. CER 0.03442 -> 0.03437. Score 0.03785 -> 0.03780.
Two-pass bilateral filter (d=7, sigma=75 each) was much worse than single pass (d=11, sigma=100). CER regressed 0.034 -> 0.042. Reverted.
Reducing bilateral filter color sigma from 100 to 75 worsened CER. The current sigma=100 for both is optimal. Reverted.
Lower indentation threshold from 1.5x to 1.0x median height for paragraph detection. Catches more indented paragraph starts. CER 0.03437 -> 0.03431.
Lower indentation threshold to 0.7x was slightly worse than 1.0x. The 0.7x threshold creates some false positives. Reverted to 1.0x.
English straight-quote dialogue splitting (.' + capital) creates too many false positives. CER regressed. Reverted.
Unsharp mask sigma=2.0 was worse than sigma=3.0. CER regressed. Reverted.

Combined header prefix removal and page number extraction. Detects title-like header text before embedded page numbers, removes header from output, and uses the number. Page accuracy 79.4% -> 82.4%, CER 0.03431 -> 0.03402.
Wider header prefix detection (up to 55 chars, require 2+ words). Catches longer running headers like 'Debacle: Lorraine, Ardennes, Charlerol, Mons 267'. CER 0.03402 -> 0.03327.
Spell correction with edit-distance-1 was too aggressive, CER regressed from 0.033 to 0.047. Corrections are likely replacing valid words incorrectly.
Conservative spell correction (lowercase-only, same first letter) still regressed CER. Dictionaries likely too small, causing valid words to be incorrectly corrected.
Deletion-only spell correction was nearly neutral but slightly worse. Need more targeted approach.
Full edit-distance-1 with allWords filter still too aggressive. CER regressed 0.033 to 0.037.
Deletion-only with allWords check same as without. Still slightly worse than baseline.
Duplicate-char-only spell correction still slightly worse than baseline. Even most conservative approach doesn't help.
Deletion-only spell correction with length>=6 still slightly worse. False positives still outweigh true fixes.
OCR confusion-pair substitutions still too aggressive. CER regressed from 0.033 to 0.037.
Lowercased dictionary loading made spell correction worse - more false positives from enlarged candidate matches.
Fix OCR reading guillemets as angle brackets: < before uppercase -> «, trailing > -> ». Also remove duplicate » artifacts. CER 0.03327 -> 0.03310.
